title: poa occidentalis
intro: Poa occidentalis, also known as Western Meadowgrass, is a type of grass native to the North American prairies. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Poa occidentalis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
